text.title: Prompt A/B Power Calculator Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from inputs to validated power-calc-spec artefact.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.input: baseline eval report + product MDE target + traffic analytics
step.action: Pin baseline_rate, mde, alpha, power, traffic_per_day each with source citation.

step.name: compute-n
step.action: Apply two-proportion z-test formula: n = (z_a + z_b)^2 · 2 · p_avg · (1-p_avg) / mde^2 where p_avg = baseline_rate + mde/2. Round up.
step.decision-gate: per_arm_n ≥ 10 else block (effect too small to detect)

step.name: feasibility-check
step.action: days_required = ceil(2 · per_arm_n / traffic_per_day). Block if days_required > cadence_window.
step.decision-gate: days_required ≤ cadence window or relax mde or skip methodology

step.name: commit
step.action: Commit to repo at agreed path. Bump version on every input change.
